final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 3:4 vertical 9-grid poster for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) lifestyle content (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "小红书爆款封面" aesthetic with "ins风、治愈感、睡眠疗愈主题" — references in the spirit of 2010s Pinterest wellness infographic design, MUJI brand identity heritage, contemporary 小红书 lifestyle creator visual culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a standard 3×3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), clear boundaries between all 9 cells, each cell centered and complete, no text near grid dividers, visible spacing or thin borders between cells for clean cutting
Subject: must include all 9 grid cells with the following content:
  Cell 1 (cover): 大标题"让你倒头就睡的8个 tips" / 副标题"失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏" — with soft bed, moon, pillow, eye mask, sleep-healing elements
  Cell 2: 标题"1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / 正文"蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。" — with phone, moon, sleepy face illustration
  Cell 3: 标题"2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / 正文"暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。" — with bedside lamp, warm yellow light, curtains
  Cell 4: 标题"3. 房间温度别太高" / 正文"稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。" — with air conditioner, thermometer, quilt
  Cell 5: 标题"4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / 正文"咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。" — with coffee cup, tea cup, prohibition symbol
  Cell 6: 标题"5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / 正文"能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。" — with bathroom steam, towel, hot water
  Cell 7: 标题"6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / 正文"把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。" — with notebook, pen, small desk lamp
  Cell 8: 标题"7. 固定上床时间" / 正文"每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。" — with clock, moon, bed
  Cell 9: 标题"8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / 正文"吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。" / 底部小字"收藏这组，今晚试试看" — with breathing lines, closed-eye figure, stars
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a "温柔治愈" atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be cream white, light beige, pale oatmeal, light caramel as dominant tones, with small amounts of dark brown text — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a clean, premium, unified surface treatment with light skeuomorphic illustration accents — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all 9 cell titles and body copy exactly as specified above, all in Chinese
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must preserve 3×3 grid structure with clear cell boundaries; each cell must be independently cuttable; large readable text with comfortable white space; no garbled characters; no English text; no cheap marketing feel; no over-decoration; magazine-quality layout suitable for direct posting
Avoid: cheap marketing aesthetic, over-decoration, English text, garbled characters, text overlapping grid dividers
